noveltyJustification: All 6 findings were current-code confirmations distinguishing existing coarse incremental/chunk infrastructure from missing 003 memo/DAG/fingerprint requirements.
findings: memory-index.ts still plans incremental scans through file categorization with fast_path_skips and mtime_changed counters only.
incremental-index.ts remains mtime/content-hash based and exports no memo or dependency traversal API.
memo.ts and canonical-fingerprint.ts are absent, and memoization_records/dependency_edges are absent from current TypeScript schema.
memory_index chunk storage has parent_id/chunk_index/chunk_label but not chunk_id/chunk_fingerprint/chunk_kind/line spans.
memory-parser emits a whole-file contentHash, not stable chunk ids or fingerprints.
chunking-orchestrator uses an embedding cache key for provider reuse but stores whole-file content_hash on child chunks.
